ddls:
CREATE TABLE "frameworks" (
  "framework_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each framework */,
  "framework_name" TEXT /* Name of the framework */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the framework */,
  "version" TEXT /* Current version of the framework */,
  "license" TEXT /* Type of license under which the framework is released */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the framework was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the framework was last updated */,
  "homepage" TEXT /* URL of the framework's homepage */,
  "documentation" TEXT /* URL of the framework's documentation */,
  "tags" TEXT /* List of tags or categories associated with the framework */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("framework_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "repositories" (
  "repository_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each repository */,
  "framework_id" INTEGER /* ID of the framework the repository belongs to */,
  "repository_name" TEXT /* Name of the repository */,
  "forks" INTEGER /* Number of forks of the repository */,
  "stargazers" INTEGER /* Number of stargazers of the repository */,
  "watchers" INTEGER /* Number of watchers of the repository */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the repository was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the repository was last updated */,
  "default_branch" TEXT /* Default branch of the repository */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the repository in kilobytes */,
  "language" TEXT /* Primary programming language used in the repository */,
  "topics" TEXT /* List of topics or tags associated with the repository */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("repository_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_repositories_framework_id FOREIGN KEY ("framework_id") REFERENCES frameworks ("framework_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issues" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issue */,
  "repository_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repository the issue belongs to */,
  "open_issues" INTEGER /* Number of open issues */,
  "closed_issues" INTEGER /* Number of closed issues */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the issue was created */,
  "closed_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the issue was closed */,
  "comments" INTEGER /* Number of comments on the issue */,
  "labels" TEXT /* List of labels associated with the issue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_repository_id FOREIGN KEY ("repository_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repository_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "commits" (
  "commit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each commit */,
  "repository_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repository the commit belongs to */,
  "commits" INTEGER /* Number of commits */,
  "opened_pull_requests" INTEGER /* Number of opened pull requests */,
  "closed_pull_requests" INTEGER /* Number of closed pull requests */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the commit was updated */,
  "projects" INTEGER /* Number of projects associated with the commit */,
  "lifetime" INTEGER /* Lifetime of the commit */,
  "lifetime_per_commit" REAL /* Average lifetime per commit */,
  "commit_message" TEXT /* Message associated with the commit */,
  "author" TEXT /* Name of the author who made the commit */,
  "commit_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the commit was made */,
  "files_changed" INTEGER /* Number of files changed in the commit */,
  "lines_added" INTEGER /* Number of lines added in the commit */,
  "lines_deleted" INTEGER /* Number of lines deleted in the commit */,
  "commit_url" TEXT /* URL of the commit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("commit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commits_repository_id FOREIGN KEY ("repository_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repository_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "framework_id" INTEGER /* ID of the framework used in the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the project was last updated */,
  "stars" INTEGER /* Number of stars the project has received */,
  "forks" INTEGER /* Number of forks the project has */,
  "watchers" INTEGER /* Number of watchers the project has */,
  "issues" INTEGER /* Number of issues in the project */,
  "pull_requests" INTEGER /* Number of pull requests in the project */,
  "contributors" INTEGER /* Number of contributors to the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_framework_id FOREIGN KEY ("framework_id") REFERENCES frameworks ("framework_id")
)
